title: wand/staff component renderer parity
implemented: Original ModelWand rod/cap/staff/sceptre transform constants adapted into WandItemRenderer.
Original glowing rod lightmap timing preserved as a 1.19.2 adapter.
Original root NBT sceptre tag recognized for renderer, capacity and cost modifier.
Original primal staff rune gate preserved through WandComponentData.hasRunes().
Sceptre capacity and extra 0.1 vis discount adapted from ItemWandCasting.
forge_1_19_2_adapters: ModelRenderer/Tessellator/OpenGL fixed-function calls are represented with PoseStack/VertexConsumer geometry.
Lightmap calls are approximated by packed-light maxing because old OpenGlHelper lightmap API is absent.
